PreToolUse.description: Pre-commit quality gate - blocks commits with quality issues

hooks.prompt: Before modifying code, trigger the pre-commit-quality-gate agent to run quality checks (lint, typecheck, tests) on affected projects. BLOCK the commit if any checks fail. Only allow commits when all quality checks pass.
After code changes, trigger the documentation-sync-agent to check if API signatures changed and update relevant CLAUDE.md and README.md files to keep documentation synchronized with code.

UserPromptSubmit.description: Proactive agent activation based on user context
